'''shovathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:woesome|woesome]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woesome|woesome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shovathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovathithi|shovathithi]] || [[word:shovathiji|shovathiji]] || [[word:shovathishi|shovathishi]] || [[word:shovathiki|shovathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovathuthuthu|shovathuthuthu]] || [[word:shovathujuju|shovathujuju]] || [[word:shovathushushu|shovathushushu]] || [[word:shovathukuku|shovathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovathuthu|shovathuthu]] || [[word:shovathuju|shovathuju]] || [[word:shovathushu|shovathushu]] || [[word:shovathuku|shovathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovathufthuf|shovathufthuf]] || [[word:shovathufjuf|shovathufjuf]] || [[word:shovathufshuf|shovathufshuf]] || [[word:shovathufkuf|shovathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovathethe|shovathethe]] || [[word:shovatheje|shovatheje]] || [[word:shovatheshe|shovatheshe]] || [[word:shovatheke|shovatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovathothotho|shovathothotho]] || [[word:shovathojojo|shovathojojo]] || [[word:shovathoshosho|shovathoshosho]] || [[word:shovathokoko|shovathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovathotho|shovathotho]] || [[word:shovathojo|shovathojo]] || [[word:shovathosho|shovathosho]] || [[word:shovathoko|shovathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovathofthof|shovathofthof]] || [[word:shovathofjof|shovathofjof]] || [[word:shovathofshof|shovathofshof]] || [[word:shovathofkof|shovathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfthĂŻf|shovathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfjĂŻf|shovathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfshĂŻf|shovathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfkĂŻf|shovathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shovathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shovathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shovathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shovathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfthĂŻf|shovathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfjĂŻf|shovathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfshĂŻf|shovathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfkĂŻf|shovathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfthĂŻf|shovathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfjĂŻf|shovathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfshĂŻf|shovathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shovathĂŻfkĂŻf|shovathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shovathĂŠthĂŠ|shovathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shovathĂŠjĂŠ|shovathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shovathĂŠshĂŠ|shovathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shovathĂŠkĂŠ|shovathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shovathathatha|shovathathatha]] || [[word:shovathajaja|shovathajaja]] || [[word:shovathashasha|shovathashasha]] || [[word:shovathakaka|shovathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shovathatha|shovathatha]] || [[word:shovathaja|shovathaja]] || [[word:shovathasha|shovathasha]] || [[word:shovathaka|shovathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shovathafthaf|shovathafthaf]] || [[word:shovathafjaf|shovathafjaf]] || [[word:shovathafshaf|shovathafshaf]] || [[word:shovathafkaf|shovathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shovathasha|shovathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shovathshĂ«sha|shovathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shovathrosha|shovathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shovathmusha|shovathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shovathyasha|shovathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshovathnkshĂ«sha|goshovathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshovathnkrosha|goshovathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshovathnkmusha|goshovathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshovathnkyasha|goshovathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shovavathasha|shovavathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shovavathshĂ«sha|shovavathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shovavathrosha|shovavathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shovavathmusha|shovavathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shovavathyasha|shovavathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshovavathnkshĂ«sha|goshovavathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshovavathnkrosha|goshovavathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshovavathnkmusha|goshovavathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshovavathnkyasha|goshovavathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shevĂŠthasha|shevĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shevĂŠthshĂ«sha|shevĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shevĂŠthrosha|shevĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shevĂŠthmusha|shevĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shevĂŠthyasha|shevĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshevĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|goshevĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshevĂŠthnkrosha|goshevĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshevĂŠthnkmusha|goshevĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshevĂŠthnkyasha|goshevĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shovfathasha|shovfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shovfathshĂ«sha|shovfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shovfathrosha|shovfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shovfathmusha|shovfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shovfathyasha|shovfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshovfathnkshĂ«sha|goshovfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshovfathnkrosha|goshovfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshovfathnkmusha|goshovfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshovfathnkyasha|goshovfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
